articles.author: John Leicester
articles.title: AP Exclusive: Europe has ‘maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,’ energy agency head warns - AP News
articles.description: The head of the International Energy Agency has warned that Europe has about six weeks of jet fuel left. In an interview Thursday, Fatih Birol told The Associated Press of his concerns about possible flight cancellations if oil supplies remain blocked by the …
articles.content: PARIS (AP) Europe has maybe six weeks or so of remaining jet fuel supplies, the head of the International Energy Agency said Thursday in a wide-ranging interview, warning of possible flight cancellat… [+5632 chars]
